workload_shape.notes: omen-worker-1 debut: conductor run bl-20260702-dee707, 5-way competing build; won debiased tiebreak vs cc-builder-1 (am4-critic-debiased, 'best test coverage'), promoted ff-only to main at 86c020d5. tokens_per_s 54.6 is the client-side measured figure recorded in fleet.json (D19 note); the same model measured 57.40 tok/s decode locally on OMEN CUDA (ollama-backend-lab hardware-baseline-omen-5070-2026-07-02.md) - local physical basis, not the observed value here.
